title: Software Update - Release Notes link
scenario: Release Notes link in Device Settings > Software Update displays release notes popup when firmware update is available
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected and not on the latest firmware (an 'Update Available' banner is visible).
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Locate the blue firmware version text next to 'Update Available' (the Release Notes link).
Tap the blue firmware version / Release Notes link.
expected: A popup is displayed showing the release notes for the available firmware update, similar to the release notes link behavior on the device Home page.
